description: Saw lines of lettering in horizontal, light turned from red to pink. Tiny vertical lines of letters appeared with downward movement.
Opaque text messages visible through crystal glass, messages conveyed themes of love one another and friendship and family.
Saw green dragon entity in glass, later encounters with different entities communicating through opaque text messages.
Only leopard pattern observed, no code or symbols detected
Observer saw Kanji-like characters; sustained observation for 1 hour; object permanence noted
All the code decoded without DMT and trained AI to read it
Saw dots rather than characters or code patterns
Observed organic mesh-like structure described as alien skin nanotechnology-like with perceived life
Matrix-style text executing left to right in tiny font 3D spatial depth perceived code in background
Three-dimensional depth with warping effects rotating gears rune-like Japanese characters in extremely small font
Dense matrix of characters tinier than microscopic but clearly visible stable non-morphing vision
Structural interference patterns observed wooden surface showed cellular patterns concrete showed voluminous structures
Theoretical analysis correlating predictions with protocol observations
Characters flowing in wallpaper toward observer in both green and red spectra
Success with 3 large hits observed in both laser spectra
